Privacy Policy

Last Updated: April 2026

1. Data Collection

FocuzNow is designed with a "Local First" philosophy. Most of your browsing history and focus data stays on your local machine via chrome.storage.local.

2. Data Synchronization

If you choose to sync with our cloud service (Supabase) or third-party integrations (Notion, Google Calendar), we transmit specific focus session data to enable these features. This data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

3. Third Party Services

We use Supabase for authentication and database management. We do not sell your data to third parties. Your data is used solely to provide and improve the FocuzNow productivity engine.
